final:
Here‚Äôs the full app list with one-sentence purposes, kept concise.

Community apps in `apps/`:
- `_example` ‚Äî Example EmptyOS app that demonstrates CLI, web, and events.
- `agent` ‚Äî Claude-Code-like coding agent with a tool-use loop and permission gating.
- `app-analytics` ‚Äî Tracks personal usage and vault health to surface what to fix or delete.
- `app-gen` ‚Äî Generates apps and plugins so the system can extend itself.
- `assistant` ‚Äî AI chat with vault integration, multi-agent comparison, voice I/O, and PWA support.
- `billing` ‚Äî Tracks LLM and image costs, including tokens, daily stats, and budget alerts.
- `calendar` ‚Äî Unifies schedule data from tasks, journal entries, and external events.
- `capture` ‚Äî Fast inbox for appending thoughts, ideas, and anything else.
- `dictionary` ‚Äî Word lookup with vault storage, SRS flashcards, and quizzes.
- `focus` ‚Äî Pomodoro focus timer with task suggestions.
- `geocode` ‚Äî Resolves addresses and coordinates using OpenStreetMap Nominatim.
- `gesture` ‚Äî Browser-based hand-gesture demo using camera input and MediaPipe.
- `git` ‚Äî Version control for notes and projects.
- `hands-free` ‚Äî Gesture-as-push-to-talk control mode that routes through the command palette.
- `hello-world` ‚Äî Minimal reference app showing the canonical scaffold shape.
- `journal` ‚Äî Daily journaling for entries, milestones, mood, and reflection.
- `link` ‚Äî Finds and manages connections between notes.
- `model-bench` ‚Äî Compares LLMs on real app scenarios from the system.
- `music-studio` ‚Äî Song production hub for library, lyrics, composition, and visuals.
- `note` ‚Äî Creates, reads, lists, and updates notes.
- `projects` ‚Äî Tracks project portfolios by scanning vault status and progress.
- `providers` ‚Äî Manages think-capability providers and live capability-chain changes.
- `publish` ‚Äî Publishes vault notes as a static website.
- `quotes` ‚Äî Shows a random inspirational quote of the day.
- `reactor` ‚Äî Event chain-reaction engine for the system‚Äôs metabolism.
- `release` ‚Äî Packages EmptyOS for distribution with safety checks.
- `reports` ‚Äî Produces structured professional documents with PDF and DOCX export.
- `routing` ‚Äî Plans multi-stop routes using OSRM with caching and rate limiting.
- `run` ‚Äî Executes shell commands and scripts.
- `search` ‚Äî Vault search with AI-powered answers.
- `settings` ‚Äî Views and manages EmptyOS settings.
- `system-log` ‚Äî Central feed of all system activity.
- `task` ‚Äî Adds, completes, and queries tasks across notes.
- `test-app` ‚Äî Simple test app.
- `tests` ‚Äî In-daemon test runner for pytest files and last-run tracking.
- `tmpl` ‚Äî Creates notes from templates.
- `voice-assistant` ‚Äî Conversational voice assistant with listen, think, and speak.
- `weather` ‚Äî Provides current conditions, forecasts, and history.
- `web-analytics` ‚Äî Privacy-first pageview analytics for published sites.

Personal apps in `apps/personal/`:
- `3d-studio` ‚Äî Renders 3D scenes in the browser using Blender.
- `ai-queue` ‚Äî Classifies AI tasks and queues Claude Code instructions.
- `asset-register` ‚Äî Tracks asset lifecycle data on top of point-cloud features.
- `bookmarks` ‚Äî Read-later queue for saving, tagging, and archiving URLs.
- `briefing` ‚Äî Daily command center plus digest and weekly review.
- `cable` ‚Äî Cable engineering tools for tension, footprint, rating, and sheath voltage.
- `calculator` ‚Äî Calculator app.
- `career` ‚Äî Skill inventory and gap aggregation for career growth.
- `cer-hosting` ‚Äî Computes per-pole DER hosting capacity and response output.
- `contacts` ‚Äî Manages people notes with relationship tracking.
- `divination` ‚Äî I Ching coin divination with vault logging.
- `drone-flight` ‚Äî Plans inspection flights with waypoint routing and KML export.
- `drone-images` ‚Äî Classifies drone inspection defects from photo descriptions.
- `english` ‚Äî English practice dashboard for sessions and vocabulary.
- `expense` ‚Äî Tracks and analyzes spending.
- `fiction-engine` ‚Äî Fiction writing hub for project management, drafting, and scene images.
- `finance` ‚Äî Financial command center for net worth, cash flow, and retirement.
- `github-connector` ‚Äî Syncs GitHub issues and PRs into EmptyOS projects.
- `gpts` ‚Äî Manages custom AI personas with prompts and knowledge.
- `grid-analytics` ‚Äî Demo hub aggregating live state across grid-related apps.
- `grid-twin` ‚Äî Runs physics-based grid scenarios for heat, wind, flood, and vegetation.
- `healing` ‚Äî Tracks mood, dreams, sleep, workouts, and habits.
- `hub` ‚Äî Life dashboard with health, wellness, streaks, goals, weather, and narrative.
- `inspection-queue` ‚Äî Builds prioritized field-work packets from asset conditions and violations.
- `integrity` ‚Äî Scores EmptyOS against its own principles.
- `items` ‚Äî Tracks physical items and assets with smart add/search.
- `jobs` ‚Äî Career command center for discovering, applying, researching, and practicing.
- `lessons` ‚Äî Generates English lessons at multiple difficulty levels.
- `media` ‚Äî Tracks books, movies, and music with highlights and spaced repetition.
- `meditation` ‚Äî Tracks meditation sessions.
- `news-center` ‚Äî Aggregates external news with summaries and categories.
- `nutrition` ‚Äî Tracks meals, macros, progress rings, and streaks.
- `places` ‚Äî Stores location notes with geocoding.
- `plan-scenarios` ‚Äî Proposes planning options and stores decisions as notes.
- `podcast` ‚Äî Generates AI dual-host podcasts.
- `pointcloud` ‚Äî Turns LiDAR scans into asset feature notes.
- `quickref` ‚Äî Stores tagged reference cards for accounts, IDs, and similar items.
- `recipes` ‚Äî Manages recipes, ingredients, instructions, tags, and meal planning.
- `reflect` ‚Äî Helps the system observe itself and form meta-insights.
- `reminders` ‚Äî Sends time-triggered reminders with push notifications.
- `scan-map` ‚Äî Visualizes point-cloud scans and overlays violations.
- `shadowing` ‚Äî Supports pronunciation practice through listen-and-repeat.
- `speaking` ‚Äî Provides English conversation practice with an AI partner.
- `staff` ‚Äî Runs autonomous AI agents with per-agent scheduling and pipelines.
- `studio` ‚Äî Handles AI image generation and ComfyUI workflow management.
- `timeline` ‚Äî Tracks life events and milestones from vault and apps.
- `tracker` ‚Äî Tracks life goals across immigration, career, finance, and health.
- `tts` ‚Äî Text-to-speech for speaking typed text aloud.
- `vegetation-intrusion` ‚Äî Projects tree growth against conductors and ranks vegetation risk.
- `voice-review` ‚Äî Records, transcribes, and analyzes English speaking practice.

If you want, I can also turn this into a CSV or markdown table.
